title: sorbus prattii var. prattii
intro: Sorbus prattii var. prattii, also known as Pratt's rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, contributing to its health benefits. Sorbus prattii var. prattii is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
